LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT HENRY SCHEIN, INC. (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AND SERVED HEREIN AS "HENRY SCHEIN DENTAL COMPANY") DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION: PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE ACTIONS BY DEFENDANT THAT SHOW UNFAIR METHODS OR PRACTICE. 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION DOES NOT ALLEGE ANY DUTY OWED BY DEFENDANTS TO PLAINTIFF, BREACH OF DUTY, OR IDENTIFY WHAT PIECE OF EQUIPMENT MALFUNCTIONED. 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION MUST STATE FACTS REGARDING INADEQUATE WARNINGS, WHAT THE PRODUCT WAS, OR WHETHER IT WAS BEING USED IN A FORESEEABLE MANNER. THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION DOES NOT STATE WITH PARTICULARITY WHAT ACTIVITIES ARE UNLAWFUL OR FRAUDULENT. (SEE KHOURY V. MALY'S OF CA. (1993) 14 CAL.APP.4TH 612.) AS TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION, NO FACTS SHOW AN EXPRESS WARRANTY MADE TO PLAINTIFF, NOR WHAT IMPLIED WARRANTIES WERE BREACHED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-29-2012 Vacated

Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Pltf'S Action Per Ccp 583.150; Declaration Of Melissa W Eisenberg
Off Calendar Sep-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Melissa Eisenberg, Esq. of Murchison & Cumming LLP, Tel. 415.524.4300, for Defendant and moving party;
Kendra Pappas, Esq. of Hassard Bonnington LLP, Tel. 415.288.9800, for Defendant Henry Schein;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FOREST DENTAL PRODUCTS, INC.'S Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff's Action Per CCP 583.150 is Granted. On August 23, 2012, the court vacated its tentative ruling granting the motion and permitted Plaintiff the opportunity to file and serve an opposition no later than September 4, 2012. No opposition has been filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Joinder In Moton To Dismiss
Off Calendar Sep-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ANNE THAYER'S Joinder In Motion To Dismiss is Granted. On August 23, 2012, the court vacated its tentative ruling granting the motion and permitted Plaintiff the opportunity to file and serve an opposition no later than September 4, 2012. No opposition has been filed. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Pltf'S Action Per Ccp 583.150; Declaration Of Melissa W Eisenberg
Off Calendar Aug-23-2012 Continued To Sep-20-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Melissa Eisenberg, Esq. of Murchison Cumming, Tel. 415.524.4300, for Defendant and moving party;
Ernest Thayer, Tel. 415.532.8533, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf.

The matter was discussed. The court vacated its tentative ruling and granted plaintiff's request for continuance. DEFENDANT FOREST DENTAL PRODUCTS, INC.'S Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff's Action Per CCP 583.150 is continued to September 20, 2012 at 9:30 AM in Dept. 302 to give plaintiff an opprotunity to file an opposition. Opposition is due 9/04; Reply is due 9/11. Parties were ordered to provide courtesy copies of their papers to Department 302 on the same day that they are filed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
